name: D3VL: Understanding Driving Scenes from 3D Time Series Data and Video with Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.19528v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have triggered the development of end-to-end MLLMs for autonomous driving. However, the...
description: arXiv:2607.19528v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have triggered the development of end-to-end MLLMs for autonomous driving. However, the main emphasis to date has been for MLLMs using 2D images and videos. In contrast, this paper considers MLLM effectiveness using 3D sensors, particularly LiDAR and stereo cameras. LiDAR presents uniqu...
author: Heesang Han, A. Lynn Abbott, Abhijit Sarkar
